members.name: CapBottom
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], generates a cap at the bottom of the tube. This can be set to [code]false[/code] to speed up generation and rendering when the cap is never seen by the camera.

members.name: CapTop
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], generates a cap at the top of the tube. This can be set to [code]false[/code] to speed up generation and rendering when the cap is never seen by the camera.

members.name: Curve
members.summary: Determines the radius of the tube along its length. The radius of a particular section ring is obtained by multiplying the baseline [member radius] by the value of this curve at the given distance. For values smaller than [code]0[/code], the faces will be inverted. Should be a unit [Curve].

members.name: RadialSteps
members.summary: The number of sides on the tube. For example, a value of [code]5[/code] means the tube will be pentagonal. Higher values result in a more detailed tube at the cost of performance.

members.name: Radius
members.summary: The baseline radius of the tube. The radius of a particular section ring is obtained by multiplying this radius by the value of the [member curve] at the given distance.

members.name: SectionLength
members.summary: The length of a section of the tube.

members.name: SectionRings
members.summary: The number of rings in a section. The [member curve] is sampled on each ring to determine its radius. Higher values result in a more detailed tube at the cost of performance.

members.name: Sections
members.summary: The total number of sections on the tube.
